title: trifolium velebiticum
intro: Trifolium velebiticum, also known as Velebit clover or Balkan clover, is a species of perennial legume in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium velebiticum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Trifolium velebiticum can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant for use in capsules or tinctures.
